0.output: Machine vision systems in battery manufacturing inspect electrode coatings for defects like pinholes or uneven thickness using high-resolution cameras and real-time image processing algorithms. These systems also verify the precise alignment and dimensions of battery cell components, such as separators and tabs, to prevent short circuits and ensure assembly accuracy. By automating these inspections, machine vision reduces human error, increases throughput, and maintains consistent quality standards across high-volume production lines.
